successCriteria.description: src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance interface with id, employeeId, policyId, balanceDays, fiscalYear, createdAt, updatedAt fields
src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports LeaveBalanceRepository implementing ILeaveBalanceRepository extending IBaseRepository
LeaveBalanceRepository implements findByEmployeeAndFiscalYear, findByEmployeePolicyAndFiscalYear, and updateBalance methods with proper SQL queries
Repository tests in src/modules/balance/balance.repository.test.ts pass with Vitest

constraints: GP-001: All database access goes through repository interfaces
GP-002: All state-changing operations write an audit record
GP-003: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing
GP-004: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data
GP-005: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control
GP-006: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled
Repository must accept Pool constructor dependency
LeaveBalance interface must match canonical attributes: id, employeeId, policyId, balanceDays, fiscalYear, createdAt, updatedAt
SQL schema must match provided CREATE TABLE statement
outOfScope: Leave module core models and repository (Phase 6)
Leave module service with business logic (Phase 7)
Audit record implementation for repository methods
Anything outside src/modules/balance/ directory except for specified dependencies
